arts.ttl: ‘Possibly’: Glenn Murray says £75m Liverpool player could really struggle vs Newcastle tomorrow
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle face off in the Carabao Cup final on Sunday in what could be a very tight game. Paul Merson reckons this game...

arts.ttl: Report: The three centre-backs Liverpool wish to replace Van Dijk with
arts.sum: Liverpool are keeping their options open in case Virgil van Dijk leaves on a free transfer this summer, with three defenders reportedly on their radar. According to Christian Falk, the Reds are considering Nico Schlotterbeck, Marc Guehi, and Konstantinos Koulierakis as possible replacements for their captain. arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk made me realise what I did for Liverpool - my God, what an achievement
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Former Liverpool captain Jamie Redknapp chats to the ECHO to preview Sunday's Carabao Cup final against Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Liverpool star details 'amazing' Arne Slot admission before Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: CARABAO CUP FINAL: Wataru Endo has found minutes hard to come by for Liverpool this season but he has been a prominent figure throughout their League Cup campaign as he looks to help the Reds retain the trophy against Newcastle at Wembley

arts.ttl: This is no Mickey Mouse Cup - the Carabao Cup final is special for Liverpool and Newcastle
arts.sum: From milk to an energy drink, this competition has had plenty of sponsors but has never been given the kudos it deserves - that might change as an epic Wembley showdown beckons

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's EFL Cup clash between Liverpool and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Julian Alvarez agent confirms Liverpool transfer interest and leaves door open for summer move
arts.sum: The agent of Atletico Madrid striker Julian Alvarez has claimed Liverpool were interested in signing the player from Manchester City last year

arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle centre-back admits he is open to contract extension
arts.sum: Fabian Schar has made it clear he’s open to extending his time at Newcastle United beyond this summer – but whether that happens is still up in the air. Speaking to Blick, the 33-year-old centre-back addressed his future, confirming he has no intention of leaving St James’ Park unless the club decides otherwise. LB: Tino Livramento - Lewis Hall's season-ending injury has come at a difficult time as Newcastle push for Carabao Cup glory and Champions League qualification. Newcastle United are aiming to make history on Sunday by winning the Carabao Cup for the first time.

arts.ttl: London King's Cross chaos for Carabao Cup final which will affect Newcastle United fans
arts.sum: "Planned engineering work is also taking place on this weekend, meaning that LNER trains won’t be calling at Durham and Darlington, and journey times between Newcastle and London King’s Cross are also extended by around 60 minutes due to trains operating on a diversionary route. Newcastle United fans have been advised to allow plenty of time to travel down to London for the Carabao Cup final against Liverpool on Sunday afternoon (4:30pm kick-off).
